  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":246,"CONFIRMATION":0,"AUTOPILOT_1":0.0,"COMPANION_2":0.0,"COMPONENT_ACTION_3":0.0,"COMPONENT_ID_4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"CONDITIONS_6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 246 246 246 "MAV_CMD_PREFLIGHT_REBOOT_SHUTDOWN"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER AUTOPILOT_1 32 FLOAT 0 4 0.0 "Action to take for autopilot."
    STATE NONE 0
    STATE REBOOT 1
    STATE SHUTDOWN 2
    STATE REBOOT_TO_BOOTLOADER 3
    STATE POWER_ON 4

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMPANION_2 32 FLOAT 0 4 0.0 "Action to take for onboard computer."
    STATE NONE 0
    STATE REBOOT 1
    STATE SHUTDOWN 2
    STATE REBOOT_TO_BOOTLOADER 3
    STATE POWER_ON 4

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMPONENT_ACTION_3 32 FLOAT 0 4 0.0 "Action to take for component specified in param4."
    STATE NONE 0
    STATE REBOOT 1
    STATE SHUTDOWN 2
    STATE REBOOT_TO_BOOTLOADER 3
    STATE POWER_ON 4

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMPONENT_ID_4 32 FLOAT 0 255 0.0 "MAVLink Component ID targeted in param3 (0 for all components)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONDITIONS_6 32 FLOAT 0 20190226 0.0 "Conditions under which reboot/shutdown is allowed."
    STATE SAFETY_INTERLOCKED 0
    STATE FORCE 20190226

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "WIP: ID (e.g. camera ID -1 for all IDs)"

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK
  HAZARDOUS "This will reboot or shutdown the system!"

# ============================================================================
# OVERRIDE_GOTO (MAV_CMD 252)
# Override current mission with command to pause mission, pause mission and
# move to position, continue/resume mission. When param 1 indicates that the
# mission is paused (MAV_GOTO_DO_HOLD), param 2 defines whether it holds in
# place or moves to another position.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> OVERRIDE_GOTO BIG_ENDIAN "Override current mission with command to pause mission, pause mission and move to position, continue/resume mission. When param 1 indicates that the mission is paused (MAV_GOTO_DO_HOLD), param 2 defines whether it holds in place or moves to another position."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":252,"CONFIRMATION":0,"CONTINUE_1":0.0,"POSITION_2":0.0,"FRAME_3":0.0,"YAW_4":0.0,"LATITUDE_X_5":0.0,"LONGITUDE_Y_6":0.0,"ALTITUDE_Z_7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 252 252 252 "MAV_CMD_OVERRIDE_GOTO"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONTINUE_1 32 FLOAT 0 3 0.0 "MAV_GOTO_DO_HOLD: pause mission and either hold or move to specified position (depending on param2), MAV_GOTO_DO_CONTINUE: resume mission."
    STATE DO_HOLD 0
    STATE DO_CONTINUE 1
    STATE HOLD_AT_CURRENT_POSITION 2
    STATE HOLD_AT_SPECIFIED_POSITION 3

  APPEND_PARAMETER POSITION_2 32 FLOAT 0 3 0.0 "MAV_GOTO_HOLD_AT_CURRENT_POSITION: hold at current position, MAV_GOTO_HOLD_AT_SPECIFIED_POSITION: hold at specified position."
    STATE DO_HOLD 0
    STATE DO_CONTINUE 1
    STATE HOLD_AT_CURRENT_POSITION 2
    STATE HOLD_AT_SPECIFIED_POSITION 3

  APPEND_PARAMETER FRAME_3 32 FLOAT 0 21 0.0 "Coordinate frame of hold point."
    STATE GLOBAL 0
    STATE LOCAL_NED 1
    STATE MISSION 2
    STATE GLOBAL_RELATIVE_ALT 3
    STATE LOCAL_ENU 4
    STATE GLOBAL_INT 5
    STATE GLOBAL_RELATIVE_ALT_INT 6
    STATE LOCAL_OFFSET_NED 7
    STATE BODY_NED 8
    STATE BODY_OFFSET_NED 9
    STATE GLOBAL_TERRAIN_ALT 10
    STATE GLOBAL_TERRAIN_ALT_INT 11
    STATE BODY_FRD 12
    STATE RESERVED_13 13
    STATE RESERVED_14 14
    STATE RESERVED_15 15
    STATE RESERVED_16 16
    STATE RESERVED_17 17
    STATE RESERVED_18 18
    STATE RESERVED_19 19
    STATE LOCAL_FRD 20
    STATE LOCAL_FLU 21

  APPEND_PARAMETER YAW_4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Desired yaw angle."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER LATITUDE_X_5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Latitude/X position."

  APPEND_PARAMETER LONGITUDE_Y_6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Longitude/Y position."

  APPEND_PARAMETER ALTITUDE_Z_7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Altitude/Z position."

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK
  HAZARDOUS "This command may cause vehicle movement!"

# ============================================================================
# OBLIQUE_SURVEY (MAV_CMD 260)
# Mission command to set a Camera Auto Mount Pivoting Oblique Survey
# (Replaces CAM_TRIGG_DIST for this purpose). The camera is triggered each
# time this distance is exceeded, then the mount moves to the next position.
# Params 4~6 set-up the angle limits and number of positions for oblique
# survey, where mount-enabled vehicles automatically roll the camera between
# shots to emulate an oblique camera setup (providing an increased HFOV).
# This command can also be used to set the shutter integration time for the
# camera.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> OBLIQUE_SURVEY BIG_ENDIAN "Mission command to set a Camera Auto Mount Pivoting Oblique Survey (Replaces CAM_TRIGG_DIST for this purpose). The camera is triggered each time this distance is exceeded, then the mount moves to the next position. Params 4~6 set-up the angle limits and number of positions for oblique survey, where mount-enabled vehicles automatically roll the camera between shots to emulate an oblique camera setup (providing an increased HFOV). This command can also be used to set the shutter integration time for the camera."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":260,"CONFIRMATION":0,"DISTANCE_1":0.0,"SHUTTER_2":0.0,"MIN_INTERVAL_3":0.0,"POSITIONS_4":0.0,"ROLL_ANGLE_5":0.0,"PITCH_ANGLE_6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 260 260 260 "MAV_CMD_OBLIQUE_SURVEY"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER DISTANCE_1 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Camera trigger distance. 0 to stop triggering."
    UNITS "Meters" m

  APPEND_PARAMETER SHUTTER_2 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0 "Camera shutter integration time. 0 to ignore"
    UNITS "Milliseconds" ms

  APPEND_PARAMETER MIN_INTERVAL_3 32 FLOAT 0 10000 0 "The minimum interval in which the camera is capable of taking subsequent pictures repeatedly. 0 to ignore."
    UNITS "Milliseconds" ms

  APPEND_PARAMETER POSITIONS_4 32 FLOAT 2 MAX 0.0 "Total number of roll positions at which the camera will capture photos (images captures spread evenly across the limits defined by param5)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER ROLL_ANGLE_5 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0 "Angle limits that the camera can be rolled to left and right of center."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER PITCH_ANGLE_6 32 FLOAT -180 180 0 "Fixed pitch angle that the camera will hold in oblique mode if the mount is actuated in the pitch axis."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Empty"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# ACTUATOR_TEST (MAV_CMD 310)
# Actuator testing command. This is similar to MAV_CMD_DO_MOTOR_TEST but
# operates on the level of output functions, i.e. it is possible to test
# Motor1 independent from which output it is configured on. Autopilots must
# NACK this command with MAV_RESULT_TEMPORARILY_REJECTED while armed.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> ACTUATOR_TEST BIG_ENDIAN "Actuator testing command. This is similar to MAV_CMD_DO_MOTOR_TEST but operates on the level of output functions, i.e. it is possible to test Motor1 independent from which output it is configured on. Autopilots must NACK this command with MAV_RESULT_TEMPORARILY_REJECTED while armed."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":310,"CONFIRMATION":0,"VALUE_1":0.0,"TIMEOUT_2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"OUTPUT_FUNCTION_5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 310 310 310 "MAV_CMD_ACTUATOR_TEST"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER VALUE_1 32 FLOAT -1 1 0.0 "Output value: 1 means maximum positive output, 0 to center servos or minimum motor thrust (expected to spin), -1 for maximum negative (if not supported by the motors, i.e. motor is not reversible, smaller than 0 maps to NaN). And NaN maps to disarmed (stop the motors)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER TIMEOUT_2 32 FLOAT 0 3 0.0 "Timeout after which the test command expires and the output is restored to the previous value. A timeout has to be set for safety reasons. A timeout of 0 means to restore the previous value immediately."
    UNITS "Seconds" s

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER OUTPUT_FUNCTION_5 32 FLOAT 0 48 0.0 "Actuator Output function"
    STATE NONE 0
    STATE MOTOR1 1
    STATE MOTOR2 2
    STATE MOTOR3 3
    STATE MOTOR4 4
    STATE MOTOR5 5
    STATE MOTOR6 6
    STATE MOTOR7 7
    STATE MOTOR8 8
    STATE MOTOR9 9
    STATE MOTOR10 10
    STATE MOTOR11 11
    STATE MOTOR12 12
    STATE MOTOR13 13
    STATE MOTOR14 14
    STATE MOTOR15 15
    STATE MOTOR16 16
    STATE SERVO1 33
    STATE SERVO2 34
    STATE SERVO3 35
    STATE SERVO4 36
    STATE SERVO5 37
    STATE SERVO6 38
    STATE SERVO7 39
    STATE SERVO8 40
    STATE SERVO9 41
    STATE SERVO10 42
    STATE SERVO11 43
    STATE SERVO12 44
    STATE SERVO13 45
    STATE SERVO14 46
    STATE SERVO15 47
    STATE SERVO16 48

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================

  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":400,"CONFIRMATION":0,"ARM_1":0.0,"FORCE_2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 400 400 400 "MAV_CMD_COMPONENT_ARM_DISARM"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER ARM_1 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Arm (MAV_BOOL_FALSE: disarm). Values not equal to 0 or 1 are invalid."
    STATE FALSE 0
    STATE TRUE 1

  APPEND_PARAMETER FORCE_2 32 FLOAT 0 21196 0.0 "0: arm-disarm unless prevented by safety checks (i.e. when landed), 21196: force arming/disarming (e.g. allow arming to override preflight checks and disarming in flight)"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK
  HAZARDOUS "Arming enables the motors - ensure area is clear!"

# ============================================================================
# RUN_PREARM_CHECKS (MAV_CMD 401)
# Instructs a target system to run pre-arm checks.
# This allows preflight checks to be run on demand, which may be useful on
# systems that normally run them at low rate, or which do not trigger checks
# when the armable state might have changed.
# This command should return MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED if it will run the checks.
# The results of the checks are usually then reported in SYS_STATUS messages
# (this is system-specific).
# The command should return MAV_RESULT_TEMPORARILY_REJECTED if the system is
# already armed.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> RUN_PREARM_CHECKS BIG_ENDIAN "Instructs a target system to run pre-arm checks. This allows preflight checks to be run on demand, which may be useful on systems that normally run them at low rate, or which do not trigger checks when the armable state might have changed. This command should return MAV_RESULT_ACCEPTED if it will run the checks. The results of the checks are usually then reported in SYS_STATUS messages (this is system-specific). The command should return MAV_RESULT_TEMPORARILY_REJECTED if the system is already armed."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":401,"CONFIRMATION":0,"PARAM1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 401 401 401 "MAV_CMD_RUN_PREARM_CHECKS"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM1 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

# ============================================================================
# ILLUMINATOR_ON_OFF (MAV_CMD 405)
# Turns illuminators ON/OFF. An illuminator is a light source that is used
# for lighting up dark areas external to the system: e.g. a torch or
# searchlight (as opposed to a light source for illuminating the system
# itself, e.g. an indicator light).
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> ILLUMINATOR_ON_OFF BIG_ENDIAN "Turns illuminators ON/OFF. An illuminator is a light source that is used for lighting up dark areas external to the system: e.g. a torch or searchlight (as opposed to a light source for illuminating the system itself, e.g. an indicator light)."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":405,"CONFIRMATION":0,"ENABLE_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'

    UNITS "Percent" %

    UNITS "Seconds" s

    UNITS "Percent" %

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

    HIDDEN

    HIDDEN

# ============================================================================
# GET_HOME_POSITION (MAV_CMD 410)
# Request the home position from the vehicle.
# The vehicle will ACK the command and then emit the HOME_POSITION message.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> GET_HOME_POSITION BIG_ENDIAN "Request the home position from the vehicle. The vehicle will ACK the command and then emit the HOME_POSITION message."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":410,"CONFIRMATION":0,"PARAM1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 410 410 410 "MAV_CMD_GET_HOME_POSITION"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM1 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# INJECT_FAILURE (MAV_CMD 420)
# Inject artificial failure for testing purposes. Note that autopilots
# should implement an additional protection before accepting this command
# such as a specific param setting.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> INJECT_FAILURE BIG_ENDIAN "Inject artificial failure for testing purposes. Note that autopilots should implement an additional protection before accepting this command such as a specific param setting."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":420,"CONFIRMATION":0,"FAILURE_UNIT_1":0.0,"FAILURE_TYPE_2":0.0,"INSTANCE_3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 420 420 420 "MAV_CMD_INJECT_FAILURE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER FAILURE_UNIT_1 32 FLOAT 0 105 0.0 "The unit which is affected by the failure."
    STATE SENSOR_GYRO 0
    STATE SENSOR_ACCEL 1
    STATE SENSOR_MAG 2
    STATE SENSOR_BARO 3
    STATE SENSOR_GPS 4
    STATE SENSOR_OPTICAL_FLOW 5
    STATE SENSOR_VIO 6
    STATE SENSOR_DISTANCE_SENSOR 7
    STATE SENSOR_AIRSPEED 8
    STATE SYSTEM_BATTERY 100
    STATE SYSTEM_MOTOR 101
    STATE SYSTEM_SERVO 102
    STATE SYSTEM_AVOIDANCE 103
    STATE SYSTEM_RC_SIGNAL 104
    STATE SYSTEM_MAVLINK_SIGNAL 105

  APPEND_PARAMETER FAILURE_TYPE_2 32 FLOAT 0 7 0.0 "The type how the failure manifests itself."
    STATE OK 0
    STATE OFF 1
    STATE STUCK 2
    STATE GARBAGE 3
    STATE WRONG 4
    STATE SLOW 5
    STATE DELAYED 6
    STATE INTERMITTENT 7

  APPEND_PARAMETER INSTANCE_3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Instance affected by failure (0 to signal all)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# START_RX_PAIR (MAV_CMD 500)
# Starts receiver pairing.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> START_RX_PAIR BIG_ENDIAN "Starts receiver pairing."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":500,"CONFIRMATION":0,"RC_TYPE_1":0.0,"RC_SUB_TYPE_2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 500 500 500 "MAV_CMD_START_RX_PAIR"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER RC_TYPE_1 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "RC type."
    STATE SPEKTRUM 0
    STATE CRSF 1

  APPEND_PARAMETER RC_SUB_TYPE_2 32 FLOAT 0 2 0.0 "RC sub type."
    STATE SPEKTRUM_DSM2 0
    STATE SPEKTRUM_DSMX 1
    STATE SPEKTRUM_DSMX8 2

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# GET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL (MAV_CMD 510)
# Request the interval between messages for a particular MAVLink message ID.
# The receiver should ACK the command and then emit its response in a
# MESSAGE_INTERVAL message.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> GET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL BIG_ENDIAN "Request the interval between messages for a particular MAVLink message ID. The receiver should ACK the command and then emit its response in a MESSAGE_INTERVAL message."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":510,"CONFIRMATION":0,"MESSAGE_ID_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 510 510 510 "MAV_CMD_GET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER MESSAGE_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 16777215 0.0 "The MAVLink message ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL (MAV_CMD 511)
# Set the interval between messages for a particular MAVLink message ID.
# This interface replaces REQUEST_DATA_STREAM.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL BIG_ENDIAN "Set the interval between messages for a particular MAVLink message ID. This interface replaces REQUEST_DATA_STREAM."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":511,"CONFIRMATION":0,"MESSAGE_ID_1":0.0,"INTERVAL_2":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_3_3":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_4_4":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_5_5":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_6_6":0.0,"RESPONSE_TARGET_7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 511 511 511 "MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER MESSAGE_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 16777215 0.0 "The MAVLink message ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER INTERVAL_2 32 FLOAT -1 MAX 0.0 "The interval between two messages. -1: disable. 0: request default rate (which may be zero)."
    UNITS "Microseconds" us

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_3_3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Use for index ID, if required. Otherwise, the use of this parameter (if any) must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0). When used as an index ID, 0 means 'all instances', '1' means the first instance in the sequence (the emitted message will have an id of 0 if message ids are 0-indexed, or 1 if index numbers start from one)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_4_4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_5_5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0/NaN)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_6_6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0/NaN)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER RESPONSE_TARGET_7 32 FLOAT 0 2 0.0 "Target address of message stream (if message has target address fields). 0: Flight-stack default (recommended), 1: address of requester, 2: broadcast."

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# REQUEST_MESSAGE (MAV_CMD 512)
# Request the target system(s) emit a single instance of a specified message
# (i.e. a "one-shot" version of MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL).
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> REQUEST_MESSAGE BIG_ENDIAN "Request the target system(s) emit a single instance of a specified message (i.e. a 'one-shot' version of MAV_CMD_SET_MESSAGE_INTERVAL)."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":512,"CONFIRMATION":0,"MESSAGE_ID_1":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_1_2":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_2_3":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_3_4":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_4_5":0.0,"REQ_PARAM_5_6":0.0,"RESPONSE_TARGET_7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 512 512 512 "MAV_CMD_REQUEST_MESSAGE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER MESSAGE_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 16777215 0.0 "The MAVLink message ID of the requested message."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_1_2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Use for index ID, if required. Otherwise, the use of this parameter (if any) must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_2_3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_3_4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_4_5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REQ_PARAM_5_6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "The use of this parameter (if any), must be defined in the requested message. By default assumed not used (0)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER RESPONSE_TARGET_7 32 FLOAT 0 2 0.0 "Target address for requested message (if message has target address fields). 0: Flight-stack default, 1: address of requester, 2: broadcast."

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# REQUEST_PROTOCOL_VERSION (MAV_CMD 519)
# Request MAVLink protocol version compatibility. All receivers should ACK
# the command and then emit their capabilities in an PROTOCOL_VERSION
# message
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> REQUEST_PROTOCOL_VERSION BIG_ENDIAN "Request MAVLink protocol version compatibility. All receivers should ACK the command and then emit their capabilities in an PROTOCOL_VERSION message"
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":519,"CONFIRMATION":0,"PROTOCOL_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 519 519 519 "MAV_CMD_REQUEST_PROTOCOL_VERSION"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PROTOCOL_1 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Request supported protocol versions by all nodes on the network (MAV_BOOL_TRUE). Values not equal to 0 or 1 are invalid."
    STATE FALSE 0
    STATE TRUE 1

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (all remaining params)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

# ============================================================================
# STORAGE_FORMAT (MAV_CMD 526)
# Format a storage medium. Once format is complete, a STORAGE_INFORMATION
# message is sent. Use the command's target_component to target a specific
# component's storage.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> STORAGE_FORMAT BIG_ENDIAN "Format a storage medium. Once format is complete, a STORAGE_INFORMATION message is sent. Use the command's target_component to target a specific component's storage."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":526,"CONFIRMATION":0,"STORAGE_ID_1":0.0,"FORMAT_2":0.0,"RESET_IMAGE_LOG_3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 526 526 526 "MAV_CMD_STORAGE_FORMAT"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER STORAGE_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Storage ID (1 for first, 2 for second, etc.)"

  APPEND_PARAMETER FORMAT_2 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Format storage (and reset image log). Values not equal to 0 or 1 are invalid."
    STATE FALSE 0
    STATE TRUE 1

  APPEND_PARAMETER RESET_IMAGE_LOG_3 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Reset Image Log (without formatting storage medium). This will reset CAMERA_CAPTURE_STATUS.image_count and CAMERA_IMAGE_CAPTURED.image_index. Values not equal to 0 or 1 are invalid."
    STATE FALSE 0
    STATE TRUE 1

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (all remaining params)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# SET_STORAGE_USAGE (MAV_CMD 533)
# Set that a particular storage is the preferred location for saving photos,
# videos, and/or other media (e.g. to set that an SD card is used for
# storing videos).
# There can only be one preferred save location for each particular media
# type: setting a media usage flag will clear/reset that same flag if set on
# any other storage.
# If no flag is set the system should use its default storage.
# A target system can choose to always use default storage, in which case it
# should ACK the command with MAV_RESULT_UNSUPPORTED.
# A target system can choose to not allow a particular storage to be set as
# preferred storage, in which case it should ACK the command with
# MAV_RESULT_DENIED.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> SET_STORAGE_USAGE BIG_ENDIAN "Set that a particular storage is the preferred location for saving photos, videos, and/or other media (e.g. to set that an SD card is used for storing videos). There can only be one preferred save location for each particular media type: setting a media usage flag will clear/reset that same flag if set on any other storage. If no flag is set the system should use its default storage. A target system can choose to always use default storage, in which case it should ACK the command with MAV_RESULT_UNSUPPORTED. A target system can choose to not allow a particular storage to be set as preferred storage, in which case it should ACK the command with MAV_RESULT_DENIED."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":533,"CONFIRMATION":0,"STORAGE_ID_1":0.0,"USAGE_2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 533 533 533 "MAV_CMD_SET_STORAGE_USAGE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER STORAGE_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Storage ID (1 for first, 2 for second, etc.)"

  APPEND_PARAMETER USAGE_2 32 FLOAT 1 8 0.0 "Usage flags"
    STATE SET 1
    STATE PHOTO 2
    STATE VIDEO 4
    STATE LOGS 8

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# DO_JUMP_TAG (MAV_CMD 601)
# Jump to the matching tag in the mission list. Repeat this action for the
# specified number of times. A mission should contain a single matching tag
# for each jump. If this is not the case then a jump to a missing tag should
# complete the mission, and a jump where there are multiple matching tags
# should always select the one with the lowest mission sequence number.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> DO_JUMP_TAG BIG_ENDIAN "Jump to the matching tag in the mission list. Repeat this action for the specified number of times. A mission should contain a single matching tag for each jump. If this is not the case then a jump to a missing tag should complete the mission, and a jump where there are multiple matching tags should always select the one with the lowest mission sequence number."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":601,"CONFIRMATION":0,"TAG_1":0.0,"REPEAT_2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 601 601 601 "MAV_CMD_DO_JUMP_TAG"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TAG_1 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Target tag to jump to."

  APPEND_PARAMETER REPEAT_2 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Repeat count."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# DO_GIMBAL_MANAGER_PITCHYAW (MAV_CMD 1000)
# Set gimbal manager pitch/yaw setpoints (low rate command). It is possible
# to set combinations of the values below. E.g. an angle as well as a
# desired angular rate can be used to get to this angle at a certain angular
# rate, or an angular rate only will result in continuous turning. NaN is to
# be used to signal unset. Note: only the gimbal manager will react to this
# command - it will be ignored by a gimbal device. Use
# GIMBAL_MANAGER_SET_PITCHYAW if you need to stream pitch/yaw setpoints at
# higher rate.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> DO_GIMBAL_MANAGER_PITCHYAW BIG_ENDIAN "Set gimbal manager pitch/yaw setpoints (low rate command). It is possible to set combinations of the values below. E.g. an angle as well as a desired angular rate can be used to get to this angle at a certain angular rate, or an angular rate only will result in continuous turning. NaN is to be used to signal unset. Note: only the gimbal manager will react to this command - it will be ignored by a gimbal device. Use GIMBAL_MANAGER_SET_PITCHYAW if you need to stream pitch/yaw setpoints at higher rate."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":1000,"CONFIRMATION":0,"PITCH_ANGLE_1":0.0,"YAW_ANGLE_2":0.0,"PITCH_RATE_3":0.0,"YAW_RATE_4":0.0,"GIMBAL_MANAGER_FLAGS_5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"GIMBAL_DEVICE_ID_7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 1000 1000 1000 "MAV_CMD_DO_GIMBAL_MANAGER_PITCHYAW"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PITCH_ANGLE_1 32 FLOAT -180 180 0.0 "Pitch angle (positive to pitch up, relative to vehicle for FOLLOW mode, relative to world horizon for LOCK mode)."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER YAW_ANGLE_2 32 FLOAT -180 180 0.0 "Yaw angle (positive to yaw to the right, relative to vehicle for FOLLOW mode, absolute to North for LOCK mode)."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER PITCH_RATE_3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Pitch rate (positive to pitch up)."
    UNITS "Degrees_per_second" deg/s

  APPEND_PARAMETER YAW_RATE_4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Yaw rate (positive to yaw to the right)."
    UNITS "Degrees_per_second" deg/s

  APPEND_PARAMETER GIMBAL_MANAGER_FLAGS_5 32 FLOAT 1 512 0.0 "Gimbal manager flags to use."
    STATE RETRACT 1
    STATE NEUTRAL 2
    STATE ROLL_LOCK 4
    STATE PITCH_LOCK 8
    STATE YAW_LOCK 16
    STATE YAW_IN_VEHICLE_FRAME 32
    STATE YAW_IN_EARTH_FRAME 64
    STATE ACCEPTS_YAW_IN_EARTH_FRAME 128
    STATE RC_EXCLUSIVE 256
    STATE RC_MIXED 512

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER GIMBAL_DEVICE_ID_7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Component ID of gimbal device to address (or 1-6 for non-MAVLink gimbal), 0 for all gimbal device components. Send command multiple times for more than one gimbal (but not all gimbals)."

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# DO_GIMBAL_MANAGER_CONFIGURE (MAV_CMD 1001)
# Gimbal configuration to set which sysid/compid is in primary and secondary
# control.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> DO_GIMBAL_MANAGER_CONFIGURE BIG_ENDIAN "Gimbal configuration to set which sysid/compid is in primary and secondary control."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":1001,"CONFIRMATION":0,"SYSID_PRIMARY_CONTROL_1":0.0,"COMPID_PRIMARY_CONTROL_2":0.0,"SYSID_SECONDARY_CONTROL_3":0.0,"COMPID_SECONDARY_CONTROL_4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"GIMBAL_DEVICE_ID_7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 1001 1001 1001 "MAV_CMD_DO_GIMBAL_MANAGER_CONFIGURE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER SYSID_PRIMARY_CONTROL_1 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Sysid for primary control (0: no one in control, -1: leave unchanged, -2: set itself in control (for missions where the own sysid is still unknown), -3: remove control if currently in control)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMPID_PRIMARY_CONTROL_2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Compid for primary control (0: no one in control, -1: leave unchanged, -2: set itself in control (for missions where the own sysid is still unknown), -3: remove control if currently in control)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER SYSID_SECONDARY_CONTROL_3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Sysid for secondary control (0: no one in control, -1: leave unchanged, -2: set itself in control (for missions where the own sysid is still unknown), -3: remove control if currently in control)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMPID_SECONDARY_CONTROL_4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Compid for secondary control (0: no one in control, -1: leave unchanged, -2: set itself in control (for missions where the own sysid is still unknown), -3: remove control if currently in control)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER GIMBAL_DEVICE_ID_7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Component ID of gimbal device to address (or 1-6 for non-MAVLink gimbal), 0 for all gimbal device components. Send command multiple times for more than one gimbal (but not all gimbals)."

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# IMAGE_START_CAPTURE (MAV_CMD 2000)
# Start image capture sequence. CAMERA_IMAGE_CAPTURED must be emitted after
# each capture.
# Param1 (id) may be used to specify the target camera: 0: all cameras, 1 to
# 6: autopilot-connected cameras, 7-255: MAVLink camera component ID.
# It is needed in order to target specific cameras connected to the
# autopilot, or specific sensors in a multi-sensor camera (neither of which
# have a distinct MAVLink component ID).
# It is also needed to specify the target camera in missions.
# When used in a mission, an autopilot should execute the MAV_CMD for a
# specified local camera (param1 = 1-6), or resend it as a command if it is
# intended for a MAVLink camera (param1 = 7 - 255), setting the command's
# target_component as the param1 value (and setting param1 in the command to
# zero).
# If the param1 is 0 the autopilot should do both.
# When sent in a command the target MAVLink address is set using
# target_component.
# If addressed specifically to an autopilot: param1 should be used in the
# same way as it is for missions (though command should NACK with
# MAV_RESULT_DENIED if a specified local camera does not exist).
# If addressed to a MAVLink camera, param 1 can be used to address all
# cameras (0), or to separately address 1 to 7 individual sensors. Other
# values should be NACKed with MAV_RESULT_DENIED.
# If the command is broadcast (target_component is 0) then param 1 should be
# set to 0 (any other value should be NACKED with MAV_RESULT_DENIED). An
# autopilot would trigger any local cameras and forward the command to all
# channels.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> IMAGE_START_CAPTURE BIG_ENDIAN "Start image capture sequence. CAMERA_IMAGE_CAPTURED must be emitted after each capture. Param1 (id) may be used to specify the target camera: 0: all cameras, 1 to 6: autopilot-connected cameras, 7-255: MAVLink camera component ID. It is needed in order to target specific cameras connected to the autopilot, or specific sensors in a multi-sensor camera (neither of which have a distinct MAVLink component ID). It is also needed to specify the target camera in missions. When used in a mission, an autopilot should execute the MAV_CMD for a specified local camera (param1 = 1-6), or resend it as a command if it is intended for a MAVLink camera (param1 = 7 - 255), setting the command's target_component as the param1 value (and setting param1 in the command to zero). If the param1 is 0 the autopilot should do both. When sent in a command the target MAVLink address is set using target_component. If addressed specifically to an autopilot: param1 should be used in the same way as it is for missions (though command should NACK with MAV_RESULT_DENIED if a specified local camera does not exist). If addressed to a MAVLink camera, param 1 can be used to address all cameras (0), or to separately address 1 to 7 individual sensors. Other values should be NACKed with MAV_RESULT_DENIED. If the command is broadcast (target_component is 0) then param 1 should be set to 0 (any other value should be NACKED with MAV_RESULT_DENIED). An autopilot would trigger any local cameras and forward the command to all channels."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":2000,"CONFIRMATION":0,"TARGET_CAMERA_ID_1":0.0,"INTERVAL_2":0.0,"TOTAL_IMAGES_3":0.0,"SEQUENCE_NUMBER_4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 2000 2000 2000 "MAV_CMD_IMAGE_START_CAPTURE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_CAMERA_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 255 0.0 "Target camera ID. 7 to 255: MAVLink camera component id. 1 to 6 for cameras attached to the autopilot, which don't have a distinct component id. 0: all cameras. This is used to target specific autopilot-connected cameras. It is also used to target specific cameras when the MAV_CMD is used in a mission."

  APPEND_PARAMETER INTERVAL_2 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Desired elapsed time between two consecutive pictures (in seconds). Minimum values depend on hardware (typically greater than 2 seconds)."
    UNITS "Seconds" s

  APPEND_PARAMETER TOTAL_IMAGES_3 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Total number of images to capture. 0 to capture forever/until MAV_CMD_IMAGE_STOP_CAPTURE."

  APPEND_PARAMETER SEQUENCE_NUMBER_4 32 FLOAT 1 MAX 0.0 "Capture sequence number starting from 1. This is only valid for single-capture (param3 == 1), otherwise set to 0. Increment the capture ID for each capture command to prevent double captures when a command is re-transmitted."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# IMAGE_STOP_CAPTURE (MAV_CMD 2001)
# Stop image capture sequence.
# Param1 (id) may be used to specify the target camera: 0: all cameras, 1 to
# 6: autopilot-connected cameras, 7-255: MAVLink camera component ID.
# It is needed in order to target specific cameras connected to the
# autopilot, or specific sensors in a multi-sensor camera (neither of which
# have a distinct MAVLink component ID).
# It is also needed to specify the target camera in missions.
# When used in a mission, an autopilot should execute the MAV_CMD for a
# specified local camera (param1 = 1-6), or resend it as a command if it is
# intended for a MAVLink camera (param1 = 7 - 255), setting the command's
# target_component as the param1 value (and setting param1 in the command to
# zero).
# If the param1 is 0 the autopilot should do both.
# When sent in a command the target MAVLink address is set using
# target_component.
# If addressed specifically to an autopilot: param1 should be used in the
# same way as it is for missions (though command should NACK with
# MAV_RESULT_DENIED if a specified local camera does not exist).
# If addressed to a MAVLink camera, param1 can be used to address all
# cameras (0), or to separately address 1 to 7 individual sensors. Other
# values should be NACKed with MAV_RESULT_DENIED.
# If the command is broadcast (target_component is 0) then param 1 should be
# set to 0 (any other value should be NACKED with MAV_RESULT_DENIED). An
# autopilot would trigger any local cameras and forward the command to all
# channels.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> IMAGE_STOP_CAPTURE BIG_ENDIAN "Stop image capture sequence. Param1 (id) may be used to specify the target camera: 0: all cameras, 1 to 6: autopilot-connected cameras, 7-255: MAVLink camera component ID. It is needed in order to target specific cameras connected to the autopilot, or specific sensors in a multi-sensor camera (neither of which have a distinct MAVLink component ID). It is also needed to specify the target camera in missions. When used in a mission, an autopilot should execute the MAV_CMD for a specified local camera (param1 = 1-6), or resend it as a command if it is intended for a MAVLink camera (param1 = 7 - 255), setting the command's target_component as the param1 value (and setting param1 in the command to zero). If the param1 is 0 the autopilot should do both. When sent in a command the target MAVLink address is set using target_component. If addressed specifically to an autopilot: param1 should be used in the same way as it is for missions (though command should NACK with MAV_RESULT_DENIED if a specified local camera does not exist). If addressed to a MAVLink camera, param1 can be used to address all cameras (0), or to separately address 1 to 7 individual sensors. Other values should be NACKed with MAV_RESULT_DENIED. If the command is broadcast (target_component is 0) then param 1 should be set to 0 (any other value should be NACKED with MAV_RESULT_DENIED). An autopilot would trigger any local cameras and forward the command to all channels."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":2001,"CONFIRMATION":0,"TARGET_CAMERA_ID_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 2001 2001 2001 "MAV_CMD_IMAGE_STOP_CAPTURE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_CAMERA_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 255 0.0 "Target camera ID. 7 to 255: MAVLink camera component id. 1 to 6 for cameras attached to the autopilot, which don't have a distinct component id. 0: all cameras. This is used to target specific autopilot-connected cameras. It is also used to target specific cameras when the MAV_CMD is used in a mission."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# CAMERA_TRACK_POINT (MAV_CMD 2004)
# If the camera supports point visual tracking
# (CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_TRACKING_POINT is set), this command allows to
# initiate the tracking.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> CAMERA_TRACK_POINT BIG_ENDIAN "If the camera supports point visual tracking (CAMERA_CAP_FLAGS_HAS_TRACKING_POINT is set), this command allows to initiate the tracking."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":2004,"CONFIRMATION":0,"POINT_X_1":0.0,"POINT_Y_2":0.0,"RADIUS_3":0.0,"TARGET_CAMERA_ID_4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 2004 2004 2004 "MAV_CMD_CAMERA_TRACK_POINT"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER POINT_X_1 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Point to track x value (normalized 0..1, 0 is left, 1 is right)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER POINT_Y_2 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Point to track y value (normalized 0..1, 0 is top, 1 is bottom)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER RADIUS_3 32 FLOAT 0 1 0.0 "Point radius (normalized 0..1, 0 is one pixel, 1 is full image width)."

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_CAMERA_ID_4 32 FLOAT 0 255 0.0 "Target camera ID. 7 to 255: MAVLink camera component id. 1 to 6 for cameras attached to the autopilot, which don't have a distinct component id. 0: all cameras.     HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_CAMERA_ID_2 32 FLOAT 0 255 0.0 "Target camera ID. 7 to 255: MAVLink camera component id. 1 to 6 for cameras attached to the autopilot, which don't have a distinct component id. 0: all cameras. # ============================================================================

  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":3000,"CONFIRMATION":0,"STATE_1":0.0,"IMMEDIATE_2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 3000 3000 3000 "MAV_CMD_DO_VTOL_TRANSITION"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER STATE_1 32 FLOAT 0 4 0.0 "The target VTOL state. For normal transitions, only MAV_VTOL_STATE_MC and MAV_VTOL_STATE_FW can be used."
    STATE UNDEFINED 0
    STATE TRANSITION_TO_FW 1
    STATE TRANSITION_TO_MC 2
    STATE MC 3
    STATE FW 4

  APPEND_PARAMETER IMMEDIATE_2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Force immediate transition to the specified MAV_VTOL_STATE. 1: Force immediate, 0: normal transition. Can be used, for example, to trigger an emergency 'Quadchute'. Caution: Can be dangerous/damage vehicle, depending on autopilot implementation of this command."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# ARM_AUTHORIZATION_REQUEST (MAV_CMD 3001)
# Request authorization to arm the vehicle to a external entity, the arm
# authorizer is responsible to request all data that is needs from the
# vehicle before authorize or deny the request.
# If approved the COMMAND_ACK message progress field should be set with
# period of time that this authorization is valid in seconds.
# If the authorization is denied COMMAND_ACK.result_param2 should be set
# with one of the reasons in ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> ARM_AUTHORIZATION_REQUEST BIG_ENDIAN "Request authorization to arm the vehicle to a external entity, the arm authorizer is responsible to request all data that is needs from the vehicle before authorize or deny the request. If approved the COMMAND_ACK message progress field should be set with period of time that this authorization is valid in seconds. If the authorization is denied COMMAND_ACK.result_param2 should be set with one of the reasons in ARM_AUTH_DENIED_REASON."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":3001,"CONFIRMATION":0,"SYSTEM_ID_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 3001 3001 3001 "MAV_CMD_ARM_AUTHORIZATION_REQUEST"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER SYSTEM_ID_1 32 FLOAT 0 255 0.0 "Vehicle system id, this way ground station can request arm authorization on behalf of any vehicle"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# SET_GUIDED_SUBMODE_STANDARD (MAV_CMD 4000)
# This command sets the submode to standard guided when vehicle is in guided
# mode. The vehicle holds position and altitude and the user can input the
# desired velocities along all three axes.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> SET_GUIDED_SUBMODE_STANDARD BIG_ENDIAN "This command sets the submode to standard guided when vehicle is in guided mode. The vehicle holds position and altitude and the user can input the desired velocities along all three axes."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":4000,"CONFIRMATION":0,"PARAM1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

    HIDDEN

# ============================================================================
# SET_GUIDED_SUBMODE_CIRCLE (MAV_CMD 4001)
# This command sets submode circle when vehicle is in guided mode. Vehicle
# flies along a circle facing the center of the circle. The user can input
# the velocity along the circle and change the radius. If no input is given
# the vehicle will hold position.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> SET_GUIDED_SUBMODE_CIRCLE BIG_ENDIAN "This command sets submode circle when vehicle is in guided mode. Vehicle flies along a circle facing the center of the circle. The user can input the velocity along the circle and change the radius. If no input is given the vehicle will hold position."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":4001,"CONFIRMATION":0,"RADIUS_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"LATITUDE_5":0.0,"LONGITUDE_6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 4001 4001 4001 "MAV_CMD_SET_GUIDED_SUBMODE_CIRCLE"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER RADIUS_1 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Radius of desired circle in CIRCLE_MODE"
    UNITS "Meters" m

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER LATITUDE_5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Target latitude of center of circle in CIRCLE_MODE"
    UNITS "Degrees_E7" degE7

  APPEND_PARAMETER LONGITUDE_6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Target longitude of center of circle in CIRCLE_MODE"
    UNITS "Degrees_E7" degE7

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved (set to 0)"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# NAV_FENCE_POLYGON_VERTEX_INCLUSION (MAV_CMD 5001)
# Fence vertex for an inclusion polygon (the polygon must not be
# self-intersecting). The vehicle must stay within this area. Minimum of 3
# vertices required.
# The vertices for a polygon must be sent sequentially, each with param1 set
# to the total number of vertices in the polygon.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> NAV_FENCE_POLYGON_VERTEX_INCLUSION BIG_ENDIAN "Fence vertex for an inclusion polygon (the polygon must not be self-intersecting). The vehicle must stay within this area.   APPEND_PARAMETER INCLUSION_GROUP_2 32 FLOAT 0 MAX 0.0 "Vehicle must be inside ALL inclusion zones in a single group, vehicle must be inside at least one group, must be the same for all points in each polygon"

# ============================================================================
# UAVCAN_GET_NODE_INFO (MAV_CMD 5200)
# Commands the vehicle to respond with a sequence of messages
# UAVCAN_NODE_INFO, one message per every UAVCAN node that is online. Note
# that some of the response messages can be lost, which the receiver can
# detect easily by checking whether every received UAVCAN_NODE_STATUS has a
# matching message UAVCAN_NODE_INFO received earlier; if not, this command
# should be sent again in order to request re-transmission of the node
# information messages.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> UAVCAN_GET_NODE_INFO BIG_ENDIAN "Commands the vehicle to respond with a sequence of messages UAVCAN_NODE_INFO, one message per every UAVCAN node that is online. Note that some of the response messages can be lost, which the receiver can detect easily by checking whether every received UAVCAN_NODE_STATUS has a matching message UAVCAN_NODE_INFO received earlier; if not, this command should be sent again in order to request re-transmission of the node information messages."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":5200,"CONFIRMATION":0,"PARAM1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 5200 5200 5200 "MAV_CMD_UAVCAN_GET_NODE_INFO"

    HIDDEN

# Trigger the start of an ADSB-out IDENT. This should only be used when
# requested to do so by an Air Traffic Controller in controlled airspace.
# This starts the IDENT which is then typically held for 18 seconds by the
# hardware per the Mode A, C, and S transponder spec.
# ============================================================================

# ============================================================================
# PAYLOAD_PREPARE_DEPLOY (MAV_CMD 30001)
# Deploy payload on a Lat / Lon / Alt position. This includes the navigation
# to reach the required release position and velocity.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> PAYLOAD_PREPARE_DEPLOY BIG_ENDIAN "Deploy payload on a Lat / Lon / Alt position. This includes the navigation to reach the required release position and velocity."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":30001,"CONFIRMATION":0,"OPERATION_MODE_1":0.0,"APPROACH_VECTOR_2":0.0,"GROUND_SPEED_3":0.0,"ALTITUDE_CLEARANCE_4":0.0,"LATITUDE_5":0.0,"LONGITUDE_6":0.0,"ALTITUDE_7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 30001 30001 30001 "MAV_CMD_PAYLOAD_PREPARE_DEPLOY"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER OPERATION_MODE_1 32 FLOAT 0 2 0.0 "Operation mode. 0: prepare single payload deploy (overwriting previous requests), but do not execute it. 1: execute payload deploy immediately (rejecting further deploy commands during execution, but allowing abort). 2: add payload deploy to existing deployment list."

  APPEND_PARAMETER APPROACH_VECTOR_2 32 FLOAT -1 360 0.0 "Desired approach vector in compass heading. A negative value indicates the system can define the approach vector at will."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER GROUND_SPEED_3 32 FLOAT -1 MAX 0.0 "Desired ground speed at release time. This can be overridden by the airframe in case it needs to meet minimum airspeed. A negative value indicates the system can define the ground speed at will."

  APPEND_PARAMETER ALTITUDE_CLEARANCE_4 32 FLOAT -1 MAX 0.0 "Minimum altitude clearance to the release position. A negative value indicates the system can define the clearance at will."
    UNITS "Meters" m

  APPEND_PARAMETER LATITUDE_5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Latitude."
    UNITS "Degrees_E7" degE7

  APPEND_PARAMETER LONGITUDE_6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Longitude."
    UNITS "Degrees_E7" degE7

  APPEND_PARAMETER ALTITUDE_7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Altitude (MSL)"
    UNITS "Meters" m

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# ============================================================================
# PAYLOAD_CONTROL_DEPLOY (MAV_CMD 30002)
# Control the payload deployment.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> PAYLOAD_CONTROL_DEPLOY BIG_ENDIAN "Control the payload deployment."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":30002,"CONFIRMATION":0,"OPERATION_MODE_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 30002 30002 30002 "MAV_CMD_PAYLOAD_CONTROL_DEPLOY"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER OPERATION_MODE_1 32 FLOAT 0 101 0.0 "Operation mode. 0: Abort deployment, continue normal mission. 1: switch to payload deployment mode. 100: delete first payload deployment request. 101: delete all payload deployment requests."

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Reserved"
    HIDDEN

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM1 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM5 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM6 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  APPEND_PARAMETER PARAM7 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "User defined"

  RESPONSE <%= target_name %> COMMAND_ACK

# through this item. Example: MAV_CMD_DO_SET_PARAMETER item.

# ============================================================================
# CAN_FORWARD (MAV_CMD 32000)

# component. CAN Frames are sent using CAN_FRAME and CANFD_FRAME messages
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> CAN_FORWARD BIG_ENDIAN "Request forwarding of CAN packets from the given CAN bus to this component. CAN Frames are sent using CAN_FRAME and CANFD_FRAME messages"
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":32000,"CONFIRMATION":0,"BUS_1":0.0,"PARAM2":0.0,"PARAM3":0.0,"PARAM4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'

    HIDDEN

# ============================================================================
# FIXED_MAG_CAL_YAW (MAV_CMD 42006)
# Magnetometer calibration based on provided known yaw. This allows for fast
# calibration using WMM field tables in the vehicle, given only the known
# yaw of the vehicle. If Latitude and longitude are both zero then use the
# current vehicle location.
# ============================================================================
COMMAND <%= target_name %> FIXED_MAG_CAL_YAW BIG_ENDIAN "Magnetometer calibration based on provided known yaw. This allows for fast calibration using WMM field tables in the vehicle, given only the known yaw of the vehicle. If Latitude and longitude are both zero then use the current vehicle location."
  ACCESSOR JsonAccessor
  TEMPLATE '{"MSGNAME":"COMMAND_LONG","TARGET_SYSTEM":1,"TARGET_COMPONENT":1,"COMMAND":42006,"CONFIRMATION":0,"YAW_1":0.0,"COMPASSMASK_2":0.0,"LATITUDE_3":0.0,"LONGITUDE_4":0.0,"PARAM5":0.0,"PARAM6":0.0,"PARAM7":0.0}'
  # Sent as JSON - converted to MAVLink COMMAND_LONG by protocol

  APPEND_PARAMETER MSGNAME 0 STRING "COMMAND_LONG" "Message type"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_SYSTEM 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target system ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER TARGET_COMPONENT 8 UINT 0 255 1 "Target component ID"

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMMAND 16 UINT 42006 42006 42006 "MAV_CMD_FIXED_MAG_CAL_YAW"

  APPEND_PARAMETER CONFIRMATION 8 UINT 0 255 0 "0=First transmission, increment for retries"

  APPEND_PARAMETER YAW_1 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Yaw of vehicle in earth frame."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER COMPASSMASK_2 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "CompassMask, 0 for all."

  APPEND_PARAMETER LATITUDE_3 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Latitude."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

  APPEND_PARAMETER LONGITUDE_4 32 FLOAT MIN MAX 0.0 "Longitude."
    UNITS "Degrees" deg

    UNITS "Meters_per_second" m/s

    HIDDEN
